name: Beef Short Ribs Pacific Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the short ribs on a broiler pan and broil until well-browned and excess fat is removed.
2. Transfer the ribs to a crockery pot.
3. In a separate pan, sauté the chopped onion in butter until it becomes limp and golden.
4. Pour in the catsup, soy sauce, vinegar, and brown sugar into the pan with onions. Stir until all ingredients are well-blended.
5. Pour the mixture over the ribs in the crockery pot.
6. Cover and cook on LOW for 8 hours.
7. This recipe serves 4 people.
